name: Canary’s Theory of Happiness: Nightclub Management & Romance
developer: 幸福観測ステーション
publisher: 幸福観測ステーション
short_description: Manage a struggling nightclub, assign staff, optimize customer satisfaction, and experience strategy-driven romance with unique characters in this adult-themed simulation game.
detailed_description:
Under flickering neon lights, a diverse group of women gather in a rundown nightclub on the brink of bankruptcy. As the newly appointed, debt-ridden owner, you must take control and bring the club back to life.

 Manage: Allocate resources, upgrade facilities, and carefully tend to your employees to revive the failing business.

 Strategize: Analyze customer preferences, assign the best staff, and unleash the ultimate "Andou Time" to turn the tide of your fortune.

 Romance: Discover the stories of 6 unique characters—from a classic tsundere heiress to a married woman, an innocent maiden to a succubus, and even a femboy—each with their own personality and secrets.

By day, prepare for the night; by night, indulge in extravagance. This nightclub management simulation combines strategy, romance, and adult charm—are you ready to take on the challenge?

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Ukrainian, Russian, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Indonesian, Turkish, Greek, Norwegian, Czech, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Swedish, Traditional Chinese, Romanian, Finnish, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Vietnamese, Arabic, Korean
